channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Gas cylinder, broken glass bottle and other litter, 8th March
item.description:
Left overnight on verge and road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 75, Friar Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 8th March
item.description:
Corner of paradise Street and cathay Street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Paradise Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged traffic island, 8th March
item.description:
Been like this for several months. An eyesore.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bushell Way, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Commercial waste left at bus stop, 8th March
item.description:
Commercial waste constantly dumped in front of bus stop H Trafalgar Road/ Maze Hill

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Trafalgar Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing water and flooding the road., 8th March
item.description:
Just saw the flooding just recently but not sure how long it has been happening.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose paving slab, 8th March
item.description:
Slab moves and presents trip hazard
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sylvester Avenue, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Communal Waste bins overflowing, off Upper Park Road Belvedere DA17, 8th March
item.description:
The communal waste bins, belonging to the flats on Elmbourne Drive, but near Upper Park Road Belvedere DA17, directly opposite Calvert Close are overflowing with rubbish. In addition, food waste has been dumped around the bin shed. This will no doubt attract vermin, constituting a health hazard. Would arrangements be put in place to empty the bin shed and clear the area of waste as soon as practical.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upper Park Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 8th March
item.description:
Flytip of a massage table by tree outside 24 ash grove se20
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ash Grove, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge pothole, 8th March
item.description:
Near the bus stop markings. Road is on verge of collapsing!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mount Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep hole in pavement. Trip hazard., 8th March
item.description:
This hole in the pavement is a trip hazard. Could the Council or Clarion please repair. Thank you. Cllr Alisa Igoe

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Milk Street, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead cat on road in front of bus stop, 8th March
item.description:
A dead cat is on the road in front of the Shipwright road bus stop going towards Waterloo.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 400, Salter Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge pothole, 8th March
item.description:
It’s next to the roundabout so drivers are avoiding it and creating havoc on the roundabout It’s awful pothole - makes a huge bang as you drive over it
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upton Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over flowing bin, 8th March
item.description:
Over flowing bins used by current builders and people passing by throwing their dog excrement bags inside that subsequent fall on the floor has been there for over 5 months. The bin collectors have clearly refused to take and empty

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glenarm Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping continued, 8th March
item.description:
More fly tipping. The estate cleaner kindly gathered it in one place. Thank you!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Middleton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two of three Street lights a are not functioning, 8th March
item.description:
Two of the silver Street lights are not working outside 1a/B priors mead to the rear of the Christian action building
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priors Mead, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near 99 glenarm road and 41a elderfield road, 8th March
item.description:
Animal fouling or human excrement on the pavement in between 99 Glenarm Road and 41a Elderfield Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elderfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on Grass Verge, 8th March
item.description:
There is large amounts of rubbish on the grass verge at this location. This is usually discarded by the build up of vehicle traffic who attempt to avoid the ULEZ, and then also get stuck by the single track bridge. Please attend and clear the verge. This I may attract vermin to the area which could lead to a health issue for local residents.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maiden Lane, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 43 Shelton St, London WC2H 9FD, 8th March
item.description:
Sinkhole on Shelton Street in front of Costa Coffee urgent action is needed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nottingham Court, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More fly tipping I’m so sorry - this is unending, 8th March
item.description:
A large sofa and cushions have been left here now. Huge thanks for clearing this otherwise more will accumulate. If you know what residents can do to prevent this please tell me as this is so frequent. Appreciated. Thank you southwark council.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Page's Walk, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead bird, 8th March
item.description:
Dead bird on Pavement just under the yellow gate need to remove please thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stonewood Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
